On 2011-02-22 00:05, Jason Helfman wrote:
> On Tue, Feb 22, 2011 at 12:03:17AM +0100, Olli Hauer thus spake:
>> Hi Jason,
>>
>> I suspect some trouble since I guess users are not following the advisory.
> 
> I was just adding this as a disclaimer.


>> I will add some extra delay like the ones in the postgresql port.
> 
> Ugh! I forgot to do that. Gurrr... Thanks! I was figuring 15 seconds or
> so...

I think 10s - 15s is an acceptable time to read the warning message, since
it contains not only a view words.

>> A quick question.
>> Is there an pre-build 3.7.x WAR file available to download and do the upgrade?
>> (don't want to go over all the official upgrade docs)
>>
> 
> I believe it can be found here:
> http://sourceforge.net/projects/jasperserver/files/JasperServer/JasperServer%203.7.1/jasperserver-ce-3.7.1-bin.zip/download

Wow, ~175MB, for an intermediate update ...

> If that isn't it the rest of the downloads for this release are here:
> http://sourceforge.net/projects/jasperserver/files/JasperServer/JasperServer%203.7.1/
> 

I guess I have to read the upgrade doc's before ....
